message:
test(oracle): add 10 conformance tests (s511-s520) covering LEFT JOIN aggregation, UPSERT, NULL semantics, triggers

New test suites: LEFT JOIN with aggregate+NULL, UPSERT DO UPDATE with
excluded refs, expression-based WHERE, INSERT SELECT, NULL comparison
semantics (three-valued logic), multi-column UPDATE, DISTINCT+ORDER BY,
complex WHERE with AND/OR/NOT/BETWEEN/IN, self-JOIN tree traversal,
AFTER INSERT/DELETE triggers with audit log.

All 839 pass, 0 fail, 12 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
